description: Creates a parallel copy of a 3D vector shifted perpendicular to both the vector direction and an axis vector. Uses cross product to determine the perpendicular direction.
utility: Shift a 3D vector perpendicular to its direction by a specified distance.

arguments.name: distance
arguments.description: Distance to shift in the perpendicular direction. Positive or negative

arguments.name: axis
arguments.type: vector3d | point3d | three numbers (ax, ay, az)
arguments.description: Axis vector used to determine perpendicular direction (via cross product)

alternates.description: Use a vector expression as the axis
Use three separate coordinates as the axis

examples.scenario: Shift vector perpendicular to both its direction and z-axis
examples.expression: G = g3d(at(4,20), view(20, 20)); V = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0); V2 = parallelshift3d(V, 2, 0, 0, 1)
G = g3d(at(4,20), view(20, 20)); V = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 1, 0, 0); A = vector3d(G, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1); V2 = parallelshift3d(V, 1.5, A)
